item.title: Concertmaster & Principal Violinist
item.description: Music is my ultimate escape and energy source outside the lab! I joined the WHU Symphony Orchestra as a section member in 2024, worked my way up to Principal Second Violinist in 2025, and had the absolute honor of being selected as the Concertmaster in 2026. Leading a 100-piece orchestra, tuning the ensemble before a grand concert, and collaborating with the conductor have been the most rewarding experiences of my college life—teaching me so much about leadership, deep listening, and teamwork.

item.title: Alto Section Member
item.description: If playing the violin is about precision, singing in a choir is all about listening. As an alto section member in the “Haiyan” Youth Choir, I get to immerse myself in the beautiful world of multi-part harmony. Surviving our rigorous weekly vocal training and standing on stage for large-scale concerts has been an incredible journey. It’s taught me how to perfectly blend my voice with others to create something bigger than myself—the ultimate lesson in true collaboration.
